programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: Guest shark Emma Grede; a line of functional apparel and accessories; a healthy superfood product; a way to store jewelry when on the go.

programme.title: Below Deck
programme.desc: The Ohana crew is very unhappy to learn Adrienne will be coming onboard as a guest, and when she blows the lid off the lingering tension between Kat and Amy, the boat erupts in total chaos. Kelley and Jennice's awkward tension is becoming noticeable to their crewmates and Amy feels isolated when Kat and Kate turn against her.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: Firefighters battling a vehicle fire are horrified to discover a man's charred body at the base of the flames, and the ensuing investigation reveals a sinister murder plot that few in the small Texas.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Kyle opens her home in La Quinta to the group for a desert getaway, but Erika cannot escape the fallout from her messy divorce. When Lisa questions certain new reports in the media, Dorit offers insights from her own experience. Sutton and Crystal connect with Erika through stories of family loss. Meanwhile, Kathy heats things up in the kitchen - and, with a little help from her friends, cools down in front of a fan.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: An unpaid loan brings a grandmother and her grandson's ex-girlfriend to court. But the defendant insists that the money borrowed was for bills that her ex incurred and therefore owes nothing!

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.sub-title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fall
programme.desc: Jason Momoa, Linus Sebastian and comedian Marcello Hernández.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Kyle puts on her detective hat to help solve a mystery involving one of the women in La Quinta, while Sutton reveals her secrets for navigating a difficult divorce. Meanwhile, Dorit and Lisa worry about how their friend will fare in her own split.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing: LA
programme.desc: Josh Flagg pops the big question to his beau in true style. James and David take on a Beverly Hills home that's been on the market for over 800 days with no buyer in sight. Josh Altman struggles to fi.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A one-of-a-kind custom song service; a work-from-home product that increases productivity; a mail-order meal service; an apparel company focused on helping clean the world's oceans.

programme.title: Below Deck
programme.desc: Everybody is happy when the new deckhand, Logan Reese, finally arrives. Amy has to call for back up when she's left alone on late-night service with a throng of hard-partying guests.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: A catamaran ride ends in rough waters as Sutton finds herself searching for support. Garcelle questions Kyle's loyalty and Jennifer calls out a conspiracy, leaving Erika and Dorit seeing red.

programme.title: The Real Housewives Of Miami
programme.desc: The ladies reunite to discuss what happened during and after the season.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: The murder of a local café owner leads a small-town police force to uncover a diabolical scheme fueled by scandalous temptation.

programme.title: Deadly Waters With Captain Lee
programme.desc: After a mysterious 911 call leads police to a riverboat engulfed in flames, they fear the call may have come from inside the vessel. As the smoke settles, detectives must determine if the blaze was ac.

programme.title: Below Deck
programme.desc: Everybody is happy when the new deckhand, Logan Reese, finally arrives. Amy has to call for back up when she's left alone on late-night service with a throng of hard-partying guests.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: A catamaran ride ends in rough waters as Sutton finds herself searching for support. Garcelle questions Kyle's loyalty and Jennifer calls out a conspiracy, leaving Erika and Dorit seeing red.

programme.title: The Real Housewives Of Miami
programme.desc: The ladies reunite to discuss what happened during and after the season.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: The murder of a local café owner leads a small-town police force to uncover a diabolical scheme fueled by scandalous temptation.

programme.desc: Kyle puts on her detective hat to help solve a mystery involving one of the women in La Quinta, while Sutton reveals her secrets for navigating a difficult divorce. Meanwhile, Dorit and Lisa worry about how their friend will fare in her own split.

programme.desc: An unpaid loan brings a grandmother and her grandson's ex-girlfriend to court. But the defendant insists that the money borrowed was for bills that her ex incurred and therefore owes nothing!

programme.desc: Josh Flagg pops the big question to his beau in true style. James and David take on a Beverly Hills home that's been on the market for over 800 days with no buyer in sight. Josh Altman struggles to fi.

programme.desc: A one-of-a-kind custom song service; a work-from-home product that increases productivity; a mail-order meal service; an apparel company focused on helping clean the world's oceans.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Kyle puts on her detective hat to help solve a mystery involving one of the women in La Quinta, while Sutton reveals her secrets for navigating a difficult divorce. Meanwhile, Dorit and Lisa worry about how their friend will fare in her own split.

programme.title: The Kelly Clarkson Show
programme.desc: Kelly Clarkson presents the biggest newsmakers and names in film, television and music; as well as emerging new talent and everyday people who are beacons of hope in their communities.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing: LA
programme.desc: Josh Flagg pops the big question to his beau in true style. James and David take on a Beverly Hills home that's been on the market for over 800 days with no buyer in sight. Josh Altman struggles to fi.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A one-of-a-kind custom song service; a work-from-home product that increases productivity; a mail-order meal service; an apparel company focused on helping clean the world's oceans.

programme.title: Below Deck
programme.desc: Everybody is happy when the new deckhand, Logan Reese, finally arrives. Amy has to call for back up when she's left alone on late-night service with a throng of hard-partying guests.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: The murder of a local café owner leads a small-town police force to uncover a diabolical scheme fueled by scandalous temptation.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Kyle puts on her detective hat to help solve a mystery involving one of the women in La Quinta, while Sutton reveals her secrets for navigating a difficult divorce. Meanwhile, Dorit and Lisa worry about how their friend will fare in her own split.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Plaintiffs had dreams of having their backyard transformed into a thing of beauty. Instead, they say they had to settle for an unfinished construction job which resulted into a heap of garbage. But th.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Actress Kristen Bell; actor Dave Franco & comic Jay Jurden.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Garcelle is in the hot seat when a distraught Erika leaves the trip early, but she refuses to roast alone. On their last day in the desert, the women wake up to a stunning exposé that leaves Kyle, Lisa and Dorit with questions. Meanwhile, Sutton calls an emergency meeting among the group - but not everyone makes the guest list.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing: LA
programme.desc: Josh Altman has baby on the brain. Josh Flagg is ready to waltz down the aisle. James has unresolved issues with Madison over a huge listing. A new realtor proves she's not to be messed with.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A solution to a problem for swimmers; a tool to help cat lovers find their perfect match; a product designed to encourage children to wash their hands.

programme.title: Below Deck
programme.desc: After a night of partying, the Ohana crew prepare for a new group of charter guests. A bad decision by Kate puts Amy and Ben in a bind as they struggle to create a birthday celebration for a charter guest.

programme.title: Below Deck
programme.sub-title: Party Dockin' In The House Tonight
programme.desc: Fraser frets that his vision for the dock party might not come to fruition. Rude and demanding charter guests terrorise the interior team. Kyle comes clean to Jess.

programme.title: The Real Housewives Of London
programme.desc: Juliet Mayhew hosts an elegant riverside lunch in Henley, hoping to bring some calm to the group, but things take a turn when Juliet Angus makes a surprise entrance and clashes with Amanda in a dramatic war of words. Meanwhile, Panthea prepares for a reception at Buckingham Palace; Nessie, Juliet Mayhew, and Amanda bond over padel; and the Juliets catch up with Caroline Stanbury for a bit of Capital gossip. Later, Panthea and Nessie meet for lunch and unpack Karen’s social media behaviour and the voice notes keeping the drama alive.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: After a Florida man fails to show up for work, police believe that he left town of his own volition. As years go by, town rumors lead police to unearth a gruesome crime that had been long since buried.

programme.title: Deadly Waters With Captain Lee
programme.desc: After seasickness and choppy waters cause a wife to fall from her husband's fishing vessel, the race is on to save her from the waters of Lake Erie. However, a deeper dive reveals a shocking illness and hidden truth about the couple's relationship.

programme.title: Below Deck
programme.desc: After a night of partying, the Ohana crew prepare for a new group of charter guests. A bad decision by Kate puts Amy and Ben in a bind as they struggle to create a birthday celebration for a charter guest.

programme.title: Below Deck
programme.sub-title: Party Dockin' In The House Tonight
programme.desc: Fraser frets that his vision for the dock party might not come to fruition. Rude and demanding charter guests terrorise the interior team. Kyle comes clean to Jess.

programme.desc: Juliet Mayhew hosts an elegant riverside lunch in Henley, hoping to bring some calm to the group, but things take a turn when Juliet Angus makes a surprise entrance and clashes with Amanda in a dramatic war of words.
